headline: Carnival (CCL) Unveils Ace Class With Carnival Destiny Set For 2029
summary: Carnival (NYSE:CCL) introduced its new Ace Class of ships, led by the Carnival Destiny, as a major refresh of its cruise product. Carnival Destiny is planned as the first Ace Class vessel, with entry into service targeted for 2029. The Ace Class design centers on extensive glass for ocean views, mostly new onboard venues and attractions, and curated Caribbean itineraries. The concept focuses on closer guest interaction with the sea and tailored experiences on exclusive Caribbean...
